title: Senior Software Engineer - Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
